# Visual Inspection Checklist

## Layout & Spacing
- [ ] Content properly centered/aligned
- [ ] Consistent spacing between elements
- [ ] No unexpected overflow or scrollbars
- [ ] Grid/flexbox alignment correct

## Typography
- [ ] Font families load correctly
- [ ] Font sizes readable at all breakpoints
- [ ] Text doesn't overflow containers

## Color & Contrast
- [ ] Text meets WCAG AA contrast ratio (4.5:1)
- [ ] Interactive elements visually distinct

## Responsive Design
- [ ] Mobile (320–639px): single column, touch-friendly
- [ ] Tablet (640–1023px): appropriate adaptation
- [ ] Desktop (1024px+): full layout utilization

## Interactive Elements
- [ ] Buttons have hover/focus/active states
- [ ] Touch targets at least 48×48px on mobile

## Accessibility
- [ ] Semantic HTML elements used correctly
- [ ] ARIA labels where needed
- [ ] Keyboard navigation works
- [ ] Focus indicators visible

## Priority: P0 (critical) → P1 (high) → P2 (medium) → P3 (low)
